PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Off Calendar

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Continued To Mar-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joann Cooley (Petitioner). Christina Cuebas (Daughter).

The Court indicated that it needs documentary evidence in support of this petition. The Daughter stated that they have an Affividit from a witness, a Marriage License from the church, etc. in support of the petition. The Court instructed the petitioner to file all the documents. The matter was continued to March 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
